mainEntity.name: What is a fractional Chief AI Officer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fractional Chief AI Officer helps a company make smart AI decisions without hiring a full-time executive. The role often includes strategy, use-case prioritization, governance, workflow design, tool selection, adoption planning, and executive communication.

mainEntity.name: How does Luke Thompson help companies with AI?

acceptedAnswer.text: Luke helps leadership teams find practical AI opportunities, design workflows, build operating systems, create roadmaps, and support adoption so AI work connects to operational outcomes instead of isolated experiments.
The Ops Guide is an AI strategy and operations practice helping CEOs and growing teams turn AI into ROI through assessments, roadmaps, automation, internal tools, and operating systems.
